verdict_reason: Reverse-translating the engineering layer back to the verse's Sanskrit structure: (1) āpūryamāṇam acala-pratiṣṭham samudram āpaḥ praviśanti yadvat → 'Rivers enter the ocean — the senior engineer receives the feature requests, the on-call alerts, the hostile customer escalations' / 'level of the ocean does not rise'; (2) tadvat kāmā yaṁ praviśanti sarve → the five-river morning's five inputs entering simultaneously; (3) sa śāntim āpnoti na kāma-kāmī → 'The senior is the ocean. The kāma-kāmī is the puddle that overflows'. The compatibility is structural and verbatim. Shankara's 'desires assume form-of-vision but produce no change' is operationalised as 'state-level does not move'. Ramanuja's 'engine of pursuit does not engage' is operationalised as 'nothing about her response carries an effortful suppression quality'. The doctrinal axis is preserved at the source-pack level. The falsifiability clause closes the closed-valve misread. No distortion. Pass.
